name: Simat Technologies Public Company Limited
summary: Simat Technologies Public Company Limited distributes computer hardware, software, and network accessories in Thailand and Malaysia. The company also offers computer information technology system development services. It sells various hardware products, such as corded and cordless barcode scanners, micro kiosks, mobile printers, barcode and label printers, card printers, face recognition products, mobile computers, wireless and networking products, RFID barcode readers and printers, and RFID antennas. The company also provides various software products comprising ManageSales, a sales force automation system; ManageWare, a warehouse management system solution; MobileNET; and Sky Frog. In addition, it manufactures self-adhesive label stickers, such as ribbonless, ESD, high temperature, healthcare, and barcode and serialize labels. Further, the company offers project management, implementation and training, helpdesk support, software customization and maintenance, custom software development, and technical services. Simat Technologies Public Company Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
